top_signals.title: ECB Hikes With Lagarde Warning That Inflation Risk Is Spreading - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: ECB Hikes With Lagarde Warning That Inflation Risk Is Spreading  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Iran threatens Elon Musk's companies in Middle East: Iranian state media
top_signals.summary: Iran will consider all of Elon Musk's companies in the Middle East as military targets as it retaliates against the U.S., Iranian state media reported.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: 9 Billion BOE on the Table as Kazakhstan Opens Biggest Licensing Round in Years
top_signals.summary: Kazakhstan’s 12th hydrocarbon licensing round puts 30 suboil plots across roughly 53,000 sq km on offer, backed by more than 9 billion preliminary estimated hydrocarbon resource potential. With signature bonuses from USD 30,000 and minimum work commitments mostly sitting between USD 2 million and USD 3 million per block, the 29 July auction opens a wide range of entry points alongside bilateral partnerships already advancing with BP, Sinopec, Eni, Chevron and Shell. What’s on offer Kazakhstan’s 12th hydrocarbon auction round comes…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Mexico beats South Africa to kick off 2026 World Cup
top_signals.summary: The match fired the starting gun for the World Cup, yet the scrappy encounter will likely be remembered not for its thrilling soccer, but for its flurry of dismissals.
